title: U.S. Army ERDC River City Communications Summit
description: ERDC's River City Communications Summit will bring together the best-of-the-best in the communications community to learn more effective communication strategies and tactics.
text:
The River City Communications Summit, hosted by the U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center, will be held on Tuesday, May 20, 2025, and bring together the best-of-the-best in the communications community to learn more effective communication strategies and tactics. Sessions will focus on branding, crisis communication, and more!
Why You Should Participate
The River City Communications Summit is a hub for connection, collaboration, and forward-thinking strategy. Whether you’re navigating crisis response, refining your messaging, or managing change, the Summit will equip you with practical tools and proven best practices to elevate your communication game.
Keynote presentations by Dr. Robert Moser (Director of ERDC Information Technology Laboratory) and COL Christian Patterson (ERDC Commander) will offer powerful insights on leadership and innovation in the public sector. Additional sessions will spotlight storytelling, media engagement, and real-world case studies from experts across the Southeast.
Join us to sharpen your skills, expand your network, and leave inspired to lead through communication.
Location
ERDCWERX, 1622 Washington Street (Suite 300), Vicksburg, Mississippi
Agenda
Download printable agenda
After Hours Networking
Join us for an evening of networking at Key City Brewing Co. from 4:30 to 6:30 pm. Details will be available upon registration.
Travel Accommodations

Jackson-Medgar Wiley Evers International Airport
